lines: Asa waits in a narrow court with no household mark above its entrance.
"Rachel did not send you. Say why you found me."

choices.label: Ask why some households stay off the rolls
Ask whether Susanna may know their names

lines: "People with failed exposure screens or escaped service notes. Children whose sponsors died between forms also live here."
"A public roll brings water. It also tells every claimant where to knock."
"Susanna may know the count. Names require each household’s consent and a place to hide the original."
"Do not purchase trust by spending someone else’s address. I will show you the drying-frame door. Knock before you cross it."
